introSection:
Troublesome Trucks Runaway Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Drayton Manor Resort in Fazeley, Staffordshire, England, UK. Opened in 2008, it is located in Thomas Land, a family orientated area based on the Thomas & Friends television series. It is situated where Super Dragon stood previously.

This is one of two Thomas & Friends-themed roller coasters. The others are Nia and Animal Coaster in the Thomas Land area of Fuji-Q Highland in Japan and Troublesome Trucks Runaway Coaster at Edaville USA.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride is themed around the Thomas & Friends cartoon series.

fullText:
Troublesome Trucks Runaway Coaster is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Drayton Manor Resort in Fazeley, Staffordshire, England, UK. Opened in 2008, it is located in Thomas Land, a family orientated area based on the Thomas & Friends television series. It is situated where Super Dragon stood previously.

This is one of two Thomas & Friends-themed roller coasters. The others are Nia and Animal Coaster in the Thomas Land area of Fuji-Q Highland in Japan and Troublesome Trucks Runaway Coaster at Edaville USA.

The ride is themed around the Thomas & Friends cartoon series.
